tempat: Bank Negara Indonesia New York Agency

ulasan.Ulasan: Customer Service tidak dapat dihubungi sama sekali. Petunjuk terkait pelayanan juga sangat minim.

ulasan.Ulasan: Zero star I would give. Think twice before you become this bank customers. If you're having a problem with your account, no one can help you out. Tried to call no one answer the call. Whattsapp messages no response at all.

ulasan.Ulasan: Terrible,  tried to call no one answer. Whatsup also no answer it’s not represent Indonesian people. Very very bad

ulasan.Ulasan: Zero star , I would given to this bank , cause the customer service is sucked, never pick up the call & the relationship department also sucked , they treated their customer very rude, I call relationship departmen his name Jerry he said cause I can not connect to the customer service , I ask him to transfer me to the customer service , but what he do instead , he hung up my phone call after he said he has work to do. funny, he didn’t  think I have work to do too, i already waste my time just to call you, how come you guys can work in the relationship department with the attitude like that. very disappointed.
ulasan.teks_final: zero star would given to this bank cause the customer service is sucked never pick up the call the relationship department also sucked they treated their customer very rude call relationship departmen his name jerry he said cause can not connect to the customer service ask him to transfer me to the customer service but what he do instead he hung up my phone call after he said he has work to do funny he didnt think have work to do too already waste my time just to call you how come you guys can work in the relationship department with the attitude like that very disappointed
